Health

Health Issues? Get Our Plan

Select your condition — get a personalized plan.

Back Pain & Posture
For desk workers. Spine alignment, stretches and yoga for lower back relief.
View Plan
Weight Management
Sustainable weight loss or gain. Expert diet + workout combo. No crash diets.
View Plan
Diabetes Control
Manage blood sugar with yoga and a specific diet. Doctor approved.
View Plan
Anxiety & Stress
Meditation, pranayama and sleep routines. Naturally reduce anxiety.
View Plan
PCOD / PCOS
Yoga and anti-inflammatory diet for women. Restore hormonal balance.
View Plan
Heart Health
Cardio, heart-healthy diet and stress reduction for cardiovascular wellness.
View Plan
Nutrition

Diet Plans — Based on Your Goal

Nutritionist curated Indian meal plans. Real food, real results.

Fat Loss Diet
1400–1600 cal/day
High protein, low carb. Desi meals with proper macros. 8-week sustainable plan.
Protein 40%Carbs 30%Fat 30%
Muscle Gain Diet
2500–3000 cal/day
High protein + carb. Clean bulk. 12-week plan with nutrition guide.
Protein 35%Carbs 45%Fat 20%
Vegan Wellness
1800–2200 cal/day
Pure plant based. Complete nutrition. Tasty Indian vegan meals weekly.
Protein 25%Carbs 50%Fat 25%
Diabetic Friendly
1600–1800 cal/day
Low GI foods, controlled portions. Keeps blood sugar stable. Doctor recommended.
Protein 30%Carbs 40%Fat 30%
Sattvic Yoga Diet
1600–2000 cal/day
Ancient Ayurvedic eating. Pure, light foods for yoga practitioners.
Protein 20%Carbs 55%Fat 25%
Athlete Performance
2800–3500 cal/day
For athletes. Pre/post workout nutrition timing. Maximize endurance.
Protein 30%Carbs 50%Fat 20%
Workout

Workout Guides with Equipment Tips

Step-by-step instructions. How to use the equipment.

Surya Namaskar
Beginner
⏱ 20 min🔥 180 cal📅 Daily
1
Pranamasana — stand straight, join hands, take a deep breath.
2
Hastauttanasana — stretch arms up, slowly lean back.
3
Padahastasana — bend forward, touch hands to the ground.
4
12 poses per round. 5–12 rounds daily.
Dumbbell Full Body
Intermediate
⏱ 45 min🔥 350 cal📅 3x/week
1
Goblet Squat — 3×12. Dumbbell near chest, core tight.
2
Bent Over Row — 3×10. Back straight, slow controlled pull.
3
Dumbbell Press — 3×12. Full range, breathe out pushing.
4
Romanian Deadlift — 3×10. Feel the hamstring stretch.
HIIT Fat Burner
Advanced
⏱ 20 min🔥 400+ cal📅 4x/week
1
Burpees — 40 sec on, 20 sec rest. Full power.
2
Jump Squats — 40 sec on, 20 sec rest. Knees safe.
3
Mountain Climbers — 40 sec on, 20 sec rest. Core engage.
4
4 rounds total. Always warm up and cool down!
